exercises.title: Expose Basic Metrics
exercises.description: Add a counter and histogram to a small app and scrape them locally.
exercises.expected_outcome: Your app exposes measurable operational signals.

exercises.title: Measure Syscall Cost
exercises.description: Run a command through strace and inspect the heaviest syscalls.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can identify where system time is spent.

exercises.title: Add Correlated Logs
exercises.description: Emit JSON logs with a request ID across multiple handlers.
exercises.expected_outcome: Each request can be traced through several log lines.

exercises.title: Set Up a Local Stack
exercises.description: Connect an app to Prometheus and Grafana and create one alert rule.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can see metrics in a dashboard and alert on them.

exercises.title: Instrument a Distributed Trace
exercises.description: Add OpenTelemetry spans across two services and inspect them in a trace UI.
exercises.expected_outcome: You can follow a single request across service boundaries.

exercises.title: Build an SLO Dashboard
exercises.description: Define a success-rate SLI, compute burn rate, and show the result in Grafana.
exercises.expected_outcome: You have a concrete error-budget view for the service.
